CreateVpn.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](https://cloud.baidu.com/doc/EIP/s/Gjwvz2wa6#%E5%B9%82%E7%AD%89%E6%80%A7).
CreateVpn.vpcId: ID of the VPC to which the VPN belongs
CreateVpn.subnetId: ID of the subnet to which the VPN belongs
CreateVpn.vpnName: VPN name; alphanumeric and -_/. special characters, must start with a letter, length 1–65
CreateVpn.type: VPN gateway type; "IPSec" for IPSec-VPN gateway, "SSL" for SSL-VPN gateway, default is "IPSec"
CreateVpn.tags.tagKey: Tag key; alphanumeric, Chinese characters, and -_ /. special characters, length 1–65
CreateVpn.tags.tagValue: Tag value; alphanumeric, Chinese characters, and -_ /. special characters, length 0–65
CreateVpn.resourceGroupId: Resource group bound to the VPN
CreateVpn.billing: Billing information; supports prepaid and postpaid payment methods
CreateVpn.billing.paymentTiming: Payment timing; Prepaid or Postpaid. Required when creating an order; not required for renewal orders
CreateVpn.billing.reservation: Reservation info; not required for postpaid, required for prepaid
CreateVpn.maxConnection: Maximum client connections for SSL-VPN. Options: [5, 10, 20, 50, 100, 200, 500, 1000]. Required for SSL-VPN only.
CreateVpn.deleteProtect: Whether to enable deletion protection. Default is false, meaning deletion is allowed
